text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and I head to the cafeteria to get
some food.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go order.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting a thick-cut steak since morning.
I won't accept anything else.

text_block_list.name: Brian and Amazon
text_block_list.text: One mega-thick steak, please!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fancy seein' you here. And ordering the same
thing, no less.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, girls. There's only one left.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I ordered first. Give it here, please.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! We ordered at the
same time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've been wanting steak all day, so there's no way
I'm giving up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been talking about steak all day! I won't let
you have it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We'll settle this with a one-on-one—winner takes
the steak! How's that sound?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... Fine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As for what kind of competition...You! Brian's
trainer. You decide, to keep things fair.
choice_data_list:
How about we forget the competition and just
eat something else?

Speed battle! Let's see who can eat a habanero
bun the fastest!

Stamina battle! Let's see who can dance the
longest!

Power battle! Let's have a ruthless game of milk
caps!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I told you I was in the mood for thick-cut
meat. Are you even listening?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No way. I need something I can really sink my
teeth into.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What about this fried pork steak? Thick enough?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fried pork steak... doesn't sound bad, actually.
Maybe I'll go with that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! The time has come for the fried pork
steak showdown!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why? I gave up on the regular steak, so you can
just have it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, right! There's no reason to battle
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I got into battle mode for nothin', then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian looks totally satisfied as she eats her
pork steak.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds interesting! You got any complaints,
Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Not at all. Let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Within these buns lies an excruciatingly
spicy habanero pepper! Just a whiff of one of
these beauties is enough to set off your internal
fire alarm!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll just finish it before I have time to taste it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Chomp, chomp. Now, that is... S-SPICY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I just have to leave my taste buds in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What the—that's so fast! How can you chew so
fast?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No thinking, no feeling! Just chew it all up and
gulp it down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Da shtake ij mine. Shorry.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to win so bad you injured your own
throat?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're really somethin'! The mega-thick
steak belongs to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian digs into the steak despite her
injuries.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll just finish it before I have time to taste it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Chomp chomp chomp... Augh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...That's hot! Am I not eating fast enough?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oho, looks like you're slowin' down! Time to finish
you off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It feels like my tongue is on fire! Ugh... I can't
take any more...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Da shteak ij mine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... At least wait for your mouth to cool off
before you eat it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle is lost, and so is Narita Brian's chance
to eat steak today...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh. Instead of crushin' our opponents, we have
to battle ourselves!
choice_data_list:
This is going to kick up some dust, so let's move
somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... You sure picked an annoying way to settle
this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
This looks like a good spot! All right, on your
signal!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, Brian! Let's dance till we drop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins the fierce battle for the steak!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Had enough yet? You can give up anytime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't be stupid. I'm just getting warmed up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh, you serious?! Now that's heart!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahh, I can't go on! I can't even lift a finger...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Done already? Looks like the steak is mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having achieved total victory, Narita Brian
thoroughly enjoys her mega-thick steak!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My body isn't doing what I'm telling it to!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe, that was close for me too, but a win's a
win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Damn... Take it, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian loses the dance battle and her
chance to eat the steak.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Just subdue your opponent by force, huh? Very
good. Perfect for a steak prize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph. That steak is mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get this started already. Standard
rules, you know the drill.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You managed to flip two. Not bad... but!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll finish this in one shot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Th-they all went flyin'! It was like an eruption!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's pointless to continue. Victory is mine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that was quite the showing! You've proven
yourself worthy of the mega-thick steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Basking in the afterglow of victory, Narita Brian
enjoys her mega-thick steak!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nice effort, but nothing budged. Put more power
into it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... This isn't going well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian can't seem to flip any milk caps, no
matter how many times she tries. Victory escapes
her grasp,
